scripts.dev: portless proxy start & sleep 1 && turbo run dev:portless
scripts.emulators:kill: lsof -ti :9299 -ti :8180 -ti :9399 -ti :4100 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ Emuladores detenidos'
scripts.deploy:preview: git switch monorepo-dev && git pull origin monorepo-dev && git push origin monorepo-dev
scripts.deploy:prod: git switch monorepo-dev && git switch monorepo && git merge monorepo-dev && git push origin monorepo && git switch monorepo-dev
